name: Monojit Goswami
about_me: Self-taught Backend Developer specializing in RAG-based systems and high-performance Machine Learning pipelines. Focuses on backend architecture, autonomous/AI-enabled systems, modularity, security, scalability, RAG-based agentic systems, static analysis, real-time systems, and privacy-preserving frontend tools. Interested in DSA, builds projects to solve practical problems, and likes guiding/mentoring others.
skills: Python, C, C++, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, SQL, Node.js, Express, FastAPI, REST APIs, SSE, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Firestore, MongoDB, Redis, Pinecone, ChromaDB, NeonDB, AWS, Cloudflare, Firebase, Supabase, JWT auth, LangChain, Linux, Streamlit, Git/GitHub, backend development, API design, system architecture, RAG, AI-enabled systems, prompt engineering, multi-tenant SaaS, static code analysis, vector DBs, caching, real-time systems, cloud infrastructure, WebSockets, CRDTs, Monaco Editor, HTML5 Canvas, Web Workers.

projects: Shiksha Saathi | Status: Under Development | Category: GenAI/RAG | Featured: yes | Visible: yes | GitHub: https://github.com/monojitgoswami69/Shiksha_Saathi | Tech: Python, FastAPI, Firestore, Transformers, Gemini API, Pinecone, Dropbox, Vercel, HTML/CSS, Vanilla JS. Production-grade college RAG chatbot for 24x7 student support. Institutes upload/manage notices, circulars and policy docs via admin panel; admins can update KB, edit system instructions, monitor analytics, and handle low-confidence queries. Uses confidence-threshold human handoff to reduce hallucinations in academic contexts; analytics reveal confusing topics, missed notices, and unresolved queries.

Campus Dost | Status: Under Development | Category: GenAI/RAG | Featured: yes | Visible: yes | GitHub: https://github.com/monojitgoswami69/campus-dost | Tech: Python, FastAPI, Firestore, Gemini Embeddings, Gemini/Groq API, Firebase Auth, Pinecone, Dropbox, Vercel, React JS. Multi-tenant SaaS evolution of Shiksha Saathi. Provides isolated institute-specific RAG chatbot instances with separate vector stores, prompts, configs, credentials and role-based admin access. Centralized infrastructure, hosting and scaling while preserving tenant isolation, authorization and data security.

Codalyzer | Status: Completed | Category: GenAI | Featured: yes | Visible: yes | GitHub: https://github.com/monojitgoswami69/codalyzer | Demo: https://codalyzer.mgbuilds.in | Tech: Python, FastAPI, Gemini/Groq API, Vercel, React TS, Redis. LLM-powered static code analysis tool that parses source code, infers time/space complexity, recognizes algorithmic patterns, and gives targeted optimization/readability suggestions. Built for educational and screening use cases to explain performance trade-offs.

NEXUS | Status: Completed | Category: GenAI | Featured: no | Visible: yes | GitHub: https://github.com/monojitgoswami69/nexus-backend | Tech: Python, FastAPI, Gemini/Groq API, Redis, React TS, Vercel. Terminal-style portfolio chatbot for Monojit's site. It deliberately avoids RAG and uses static prompt-scoped context, a controlled roast persona over factual answers, Redis per-user/global rate limiting, bounded multi-turn history, and strict constraints to prevent drift/hallucinations.

Make-a-Chatbot | Status: Under Development | Category: Frontend/GenAI | Featured: no | Visible: no | GitHub: https://github.com/monojitgoswami69/make-a-chatbot | Tech: React JS, JavaScript, Gemini API, Groq API. Frontend-only chatbot builder where users prototype LLM chatbots with their own API keys and system prompts. No backend: API calls/config stay client-side, keys stay on the user's device/session memory. Supports Gemini/Groq provider switching, streaming toggle, prompt testing, and exports minimal Python or Node.js starter templates with env files and test curl scripts.

Certify | Status: Completed | Category: Frontend | Featured: no | Visible: yes | GitHub: https://github.com/monojitgoswami69/certify | Demo: https://certify.mgbuilds.in | Tech: React TS, JavaScript, HTML5 Canvas, Web Workers, Vercel. Frontend-only mass certificate generator. Users upload a template and CSV, draw/move text boxes, map fields, customize alignment/font size/fonts including 1900+ Google Fonts, then render certificates locally. Uses configurable Web Workers and 3000-item batches to reduce memory pressure and can reach about 5x speedup; data never leaves device.

Collabify | Status: Under Development | Category: Full Stack | Featured: yes | Visible: yes | GitHub: https://github.com/monojitgoswami69/collabify | Demo: https://collabify.mgbuilds.in/ | Tech: Next.js, Node.js, React TS, WebSockets, CRDTs, Monaco Editor, GitHub API. Browser-based collaborative coding platform for zero-install team sessions. Next.js frontend plus Node.js WebSocket collaboration server. Host-controlled rooms, short room codes, join approvals, real-time Monaco editing, Yjs CRDT sync, live cursors/selections, room chat, file sharing, per-file sync channels, and GitHub OAuth repository import including private repos with proper scopes.
